programmes.show_description: 1980 was another top year in music, with pop and new wave rubbing shoulders with rock, reggae, synth and even a love song or two! Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.
1981 was another top year in music, with the New Romantics and Synth Pop conquering the world and changing the sound of the chart forever. Bruno Brookes has the story - month by month.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Kim Wilde, Cliff Richard, OMD, Duran Duran & Heaven 17.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Style Council, Boy George, Chris Rea, Billy Idol & Squeeze.
Sixty minutes of back to back UK chart runners-up from 1986 - including hit ladies Madonna, Sinitta, Kim Wilde and Su Pollard! With Mr Charts himself, Mark Goodier.
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights and iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1986!
The Mission's gobby frontman with big, bold and ambitious 80s sounds that offered a true alternative to the ever present cheesy pop fare. From Joy Divison in 1980 to Electronic in 89.
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
Pop legend Toyah brings 30 memorable videos featuring a cavalcade of clothing calamities from superstars including Bowie, Madonna, Adam Ant and many more in this crazy countdown!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Mr Favourite Shirts selects his Favourite Bands! Haircut 100's Nick Heyward with 25 classic groups from the first half of the '80s, including Altered Images, Heaven 17 and ABC.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Get the amps cranked up to 11 as Gary Davies is ready to rock with two hours of truly epic tracks! These are the 25 very best bands and artists that became '80s stadium superstars.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Paul Young, who has sung one or two himself, brings you 25 classic '80s hits that were all covers, including Whitney, Madness, Billy Idol and Simply Red. Some will really surprise you!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Remember top TV music show 'No Limits' back in the day? Jenny Powell is back, with two hours of only the very best that featured on that programme. Turn it up LOUD!
Dramatic storylines, big dance routines, neon lights & iconic fashions - these are the classic music videos that made 1982!
Bruno Brookes with the year of the Kids from Fame and Eurovision's Bucks Fizz and Bardo! And we also first encountered future global superstars George Michael and Boy George.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Adam Ant, Shalamar, Musical Youth, Rod Stewart & The Assembly.
You may remember the artists, but do you recall their lesser heard songs? With Blancmange, Elton John, Ultravox, Malcolm McClaren & Bananarama.
Battle of the Glasgow '80s supergroups as Simple Minds go up against Deacon Blue!
Before the CD, the perfect pop songs were spun by singers and bands on 7 inch vinyl. From 1980-1984 these were the classic UK hits that invaded the world!
In the 80s the Scottish scene was vibrant and creative with punk, indie, synth, acoustic and Celtic folk influences topping the charts. Altered Images' Clare Grogan has 30 of the best.
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
Amazingly, every one of these 23 top tunes only spent seven days at the top of the UK chart during the 1980s - even big songs by superstars like Madonna, Kylie, Blondie and U2!
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!

programmes.show_name: Matt Goss' Famous Pop of the 80s!
programmes.show_description: Matt has hand-picked 25 tracks by amazing performers - all of them famous pop songs of the '80s. From Madness in 1980 to Madonna in 1989, plus his new video 'Beautiful Unknown.'
All '80s - 24/7 - the feelgood pop decade where the Brits invaded the world!
With just five years as a partnership, Andrew and George produced these 10 chart hits in the mid 1980s. George went on to greater things, but what happened to lovely Andrew?
10 classic looks that set the fashion of the 80s! From 1983's leather vest on first video "Everybody" to the Blonde Ambition corsets of Express Yourself at the end of the decade.
25 fabulous dance tracks from the UK and across Europe.
Duncan James and his band Blue represented the UK in 2011 - coming 11th! But there have been far bigger winners and losers over 50 years - here are 2 hours of highs - and lows!
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.

programmes.show_name: So Awful, Yet So Amazing! Top 20
programmes.show_description: Twenty songs and videos from the '80s that some would think are pretty awful, but we think are just magnificent - in their own way! Please leave credibility shoes at the door.
It's the weekend, and we're showing out! Classic pop that has stood the test of time.
Robin Banks with 25 amazing songs, 25 nonsense titles - in order from 1980-1989. Fancy Dinner with Gershwin or a Walk with the Dinosaur? This is where to come!
